headline: Congress takes a breather with both chambers in brief pro forma session Thursday, eyeing Monday's judicial confirmations and committee action.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate convened in pro forma session Thursday afternoon, adjourning within seconds at 4:00:30 p.m. No substantive business was conducted, as the chamber is in a brief recess before resuming Monday.

onTheFloor.title: Confirmation vote for U.S. Circuit Judge for the Second Circuit
Confirmation vote for U.S. District Judge for the Southern District of Texas

house.lastSessionSummary: The House met briefly Thursday for 3 minutes, introducing 39 new bills and 3 resolutions, with six committee reports filed covering topics from ALS research to aviation security and terrorism threat assessments. No votes were held.

onTheFloor.title: Reauthorize ALS Act provisions through fiscal year 2031
Establish IMPROVE Initiative within National Institutes of Health
Reorganize Engagement, Liaison, and Outreach Office at Department of Homeland Security
Establish funds for investments in aviation security
Assess terrorism threats from foreign terrorist organizations in major non-NATO allies

committees.topic: Hearing on H.R. 139 (Sunshine Protection Act of 2025) and rule markups for appropriations and veteran benefits bills

committees.committee: Committee on Veterans' Affairs, Subcommittee on Technology Modernization
committees.topic: PACT Act Implementation: Modernizing VA Disability Claims Through Effective Technology
